properties.remark: APPARANT MICRO-BURST BLEW OVER SEVERAL LARGE TREES, AND DAMAGED ROOFS TO HOMES AND OUTBUILDINGS IN A TWO BLOCK RADIUS OF SOUTH 14TH AND WEST ALABAMA STREETS IN DURANT. ALL TREES WERE LAID OVER TO THE SOUTHWEST. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.
